title: silene multicaulis subsp. genistifolia
intro: Silene multicaulis subsp. genistifolia, also known as Chinese catchfly, is a plant species belonging to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The plant's extracts have been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, soothing coughs, and treating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Silene multicaulis subsp. genistifolia is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to promote respiratory health and relieve congestion.
